title: Liverpool heatwave: 37°C forecast with sunny skies and high humidity
summary_full: Liverpool braces for a scorching heatwave today, June 25, 2026, with temperatures soaring to a peak of 37°C under clear skies. Residents are urged to stay hydrated and limit outdoor activities during the hottest hours.
summary_public: Liverpool braces for a scorching heatwave today, June 25, 2026, with temperatures soaring to a peak of 37°C under clear skies. Residents are urged to stay hydrated and limit outdoor activities during the hottest hours.
